name: writhing_stalker.live_plan_seam_mcw
description: Basic live writhing-stalker proof: spawn one hostile writhing stalker in the McWilliams live-debug fixture, turn safe mode off so the live window actually advances, require target acquisition plus the live monster-plan seam, then save/audit same-run active-monster state. This proves the live plan-turn seam; it does not claim exposed-retreat behavior.

steps.label: post_load_stalker_live_plan_seam_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the transformed McWilliams live-debug fixture loads to the normal live map before the writhing stalker is spawned

steps.label: debug_spawn_writhing_stalker_one_east
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug spawn monster primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug spawn monster helper returns to the live map after selecting writhing stalker and confirming a target tile one square east of the player
steps.expected_immediate_state: one hostile mon_writhing_stalker should exist at a plausible visible distance, close enough for exposed/focus retreat but not spawned on top of the player
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing later same-run writhing_stalker live_plan artifact lines makes this row non-green

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_writhing_stalker_live_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off after the writhing stalker spawn so the live turn window is not consumed by the safe-mode monster warning prompt

steps.label: advance_short_writhing_stalker_plan_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: a short live turn window runs after the stalker spawn; feature proof depends on same-run target_probe and live_plan debug lines, not the screenshot alone
steps.failure_rule: if the artifact delta lacks target acquisition and live_plan seam lines, this scene is inconclusive rather than green

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_live_plan_seam
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain target acquisition plus live writhing-stalker plan seam lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the spawned writhing stalker acquired the player and reached the live monster-plan seam

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_writhing_stalker_plan_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the live-plan window and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_writhing_stalker_plan_window
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the writhing-stalker plan-scene save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the live-plan window; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_writhing_stalker_plan_window
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_writhing_stalker_plan_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the writhing-stalker live-plan scene save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed writhing-stalker live-plan scene save, proving the following active_monsters audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_after_live_plan_scene
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain mon_writhing_stalker after same-run live-plan seam proof
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved active_monsters metadata contains the live writhing stalker after the target/plan-turn proof window

evidence_contract.claim: a spawned writhing stalker acquires the player and reaches the live monster-plan seam in the live McWilliams fixture
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No basic live-scene credit if startup/load, debug-spawn footing, safe-mode-off live turn window, same-run target_probe/live_plan lines, save/writeback, and active-monster metadata are not all present and classified separately.
